zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomasine Barrington於1415年出生在英國素可易亞斯特 霍阿利時，她的父親John Barrington29歲，母親Lady Isabel Tatton30歲。她於1456年之前與William Sidney IV結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1498年1月28日在英國素福爾可布萊斯賀包享年83歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可布萊斯賀包霍利 特利尼迪 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomasine Barrington于1415年出生在英国素可易亞斯特 霍阿利时，她的父亲John Barrington29岁，母亲Lady Isabel Tatton30岁。她于1456年之前与William Sidney IV结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1498年1月28日在英国素福爾可布萊斯賀包享年83岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可布萊斯賀包霍利 特利尼迪 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Barrington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Barrington. The one in Gloucestershire is named with the Old English personal name Beorn + -ing- denoting association + tūn ‘settlement’. The Somerset placename is of Norman origin, and is probably derived from Barentin in Seine-Maritime, France. The first element of the Cambridgeshire example is the genitive form of an unattested Old English personal name Bāra.
Irish: adopted as an English form of Gaelic Ó Bearáin, ‘descendant of Bearán’ (see Barnes 3 and Barron ).

variants.name: Barnes
meanings: English: habitational name from Barnes (on the Surrey bank of the Thames in London), named with Old English bere-ærn ‘barn, a storehouse for barley and other grain’, or a topographic name or metonymic occupational name for someone who lived by or worked at a barn or barns, from Middle English barn ‘barn, granary’.

English: variant of Barne, with excrescent -s, derived from either the Middle English personal name Bern, Barn (based on the Scandinavian personal name Biǫrn or Old English Beorn, both from a word meaning ‘warrior’), or from Middle English barn (Old Norse barn) ‘child’. The latter term is found as a byname for men of the upper classes; it might also have had the meaning ‘young man of a prominent family’, like Middle English child (see Child ).
Irish: in Ireland in many cases this is no doubt the English name, but in others it is possibly an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Bearáin ‘descendant of Bearán’, a byname meaning ‘spear’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomasine
meanings: Hebrew: A twin; Thomasine is a female version.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomasine Barrington was born in 1415, in East Hoathly, Sussex, England, her father, John Barrington, was 29 and her mother, Lady Isabel Tatton, was 30. She married William Sidney IV before 1456. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 28 January 1498, in Blythburgh, Suffolk, England, at the age of 83, and was buried in Holy Trinity Churchyard, Blythburgh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomasine Barrington est née en 1415, à East Hoathly, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John Barrington, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabel Tatton, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé William Sidney IV avant 1456. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 janvier 1498, à Blythburgh, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Holy Trinity Churchyard, Blythburgh, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomasine Barrington 1415 in East Hoathly, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Barrington 29 und ihre Mutter Lady Isabel Tatton 30. Sie hat vor 1456 William Sidney IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. Januar 1498 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Blythburgh, Suffolk, England und wurde in Holy Trinity Churchyard, Blythburgh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasine Barrington è nata il nel 1415 nel East Hoathly, Sussex, England, sua padre, John Barrington, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Lady Isabel Tatton, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato William Sidney IV prima del 1456. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 28 gennaio 1498, nel Blythburgh, Suffolk, England, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Holy Trinity Churchyard, Blythburgh, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomasine Barringtonが1415年にイギリススセックスエアスト ホーアスリーで生まれた時，父John Barringtonは29歳，母Lady Isabel Tattonは30歳であった。1456年以前にWilliam Sidney IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1498年1月28日にイギリススフォルクブリスブルグで83歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクブリスブルグホーリー トリニトイ チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Holy Trinity Churchyard, Blythburgh, Suf: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 블리스버그h 홀이 트리니티 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Thomasine Barrington(이)가 1415년 영국 수세스 이스트 호슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Barrington(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Isabel Tatton(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1456년 이전 William Sidney IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1498년 1월 28일 영국 수폴크 블리스버그h에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 블리스버그h 홀이 트리니티 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasine Barrington nasceu em 1415, em East Hoathly, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Barrington, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabel Tatton, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com William Sidney IV antes 1456. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Holy Trinity Churchyard, Blythburgh, Suf: холи тринити чурчярд, блитбург, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomasine Barrington родилась в 1415 г. в местности эаст хоатли, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John Barrington было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabel Tatton, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Sidney IV перед 1456 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 28 января 1498 г. в местности блитбург, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности холи тринити чурчярд, блитбург, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
